results.rendered_html:
aviyoga a. Not separated, united, connected.
— gaḥ
1 Non-separation, presence.
2 Conjunction, association.
Comp.
— tṛtīyā N. of a certain
(pb) festival or holiday.
— vrataṃ a vow to be observed by women on the third day of the first fortnight of Mārgaśīrṣa.
